story:
"

 Once upon a time in a far off land called Earth where rivers were filled with cry me a river water . Once a tank was built to contain it all so nothing could escape the world under its influence . Every year since then , the water never went below zero degrees for days on end , as if by magic this way an over flow of heat from above reached down into the ground and slowly war he earth until that warm summer sun started sending it down again to free up that deep cool winter air to come over night in such a

- Start with an opening line that sets up your plot in the first sentence or two ( i have been waiting for something to happen for four years )
  - Use simple language while describing each character ( I was so excited when my best friend told me she had just started looking at houses ) 
  - Use strong focus on one or more main characters ( I waited every day until I met her ) 
  - End with a satisfying resolution for both leads ( we finally got married after months of trying to find the perfect place )
